subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enlightened by the light of the Heaven of Knowledge! I sweat by that Spirit
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستشرق از انوار عرفان قسم بان روح مصور و حیات مجسم عالم که چون بیاد احبای
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @prayer for spiritual recognition
